author: Aymeric Giraudet
subject: feat(chat): support prompt suggestions (#6831)
body:
* init

* feat(chat): support prompt suggestions

* implement design

* style buttons better

* revert some files from previous branch

* fix types

* fix return name

* send message directly

* fix: ensure cache key includes id separator consistently

* feat: extract suggestions from message parts and filter out data parts

* feat: bypass cache when regenerating chat messages

* feat: style chat prompt suggestions with animations

* chore: update maxSize for chat CSS file

* test: ensure consistent chat cache key formatting

* test: fix prefer template
